# Flames Restaurant

> Flames is a fine-dining wood-fire grill restaurant located at 12 Ember Lane, Downtown, New York, NY 10001. Founded in 2010 by Executive Chef Marcus Reyne, Flames specialises in open-flame cooking using hickory, oak, and cherry wood, with seasonal ingredients sourced from farms within 50 miles. The restaurant seats over 120 guests across two dining rooms and a private event space.

## About

Flames opened in 2010 as a 20-seat neighbourhood spot with a handwritten daily menu. By 2013 it expanded to 80 seats and earned "Best New Restaurant" from Culinary Herald. Today it seats 120+ guests nightly while staying true to its founding philosophy: honest cooking, bold fire, no shortcuts.

Key team members:
- **Marcus Reyne** — Executive Chef & Founder (trained in Lyon and New York)
- **Isabelle Chen** — Head Pastry Chef (French patisserie precision meets flame-inspired desserts)
- **Stefan Adler** — Head Sommelier (200-label wine cellar)
- **Priya Nair** — Restaurant Manager (with Flames since day one)

## Opening Hours

- Monday – Thursday: Lunch 12:00–3:00 pm · Dinner 6:00–10:00 pm
- Friday – Saturday: Lunch 12:00–3:00 pm · Dinner 5:30–11:30 pm
- Sunday: Brunch 11:00 am–3:00 pm · Dinner 6:00–9:30 pm

## Contact

- Address: 12 Ember Lane, Downtown District, New York, NY 10001
- Phone: +1 (555) 326-4637 (Mon–Sat, 10:00 am–10:00 pm)
- General enquiries: hello@flamesrestaurant.com
- Private dining & events: events@flamesrestaurant.com
- Press & media: press@flamesrestaurant.com
- Careers: careers@flamesrestaurant.com
- Nearest subway: Ember Station (Lines A, C) · Parking on Cinder Street

## Reservations

Online booking available. Walk-ins welcome; reservations strongly recommended on weekends. Tables held 15 minutes past booking time. Cancellations accepted up to 24 hours in advance. Smart casual dress code. Children welcome before 8:00 pm. Private dining room seats up to 20 guests (deposit may apply for parties of 8+).

## Menu

### Starters

**Soups**
- Charred Tomato Bisque — open-fire roasted heritage tomatoes, smoked cream, basil oil, sourdough croutons (vegan option available) — $12
- French Onion — Flame Style — caramelised onion broth, gruyère gratin croûte, fresh thyme, sherry — $14
- Lobster Bisque (Seasonal) — saffron lobster broth, crayfish tail, tarragon cream, caviar — $18

**Salads & Cold Plates**
- Flame-Blistered Burrata — heirloom tomatoes, basil oil, aged balsamic, Maldon sea salt, ciabatta (vegetarian) — $16
- Charred Caesar Salad — char-grilled romaine, house-smoked anchovy dressing, Pecorino, garlic croutons — $14 (+ chicken $6 / + prawns $9)
- Warm Beet & Goat Cheese Salad — roasted candy stripe beets, whipped goat cheese, candied walnuts, honey vinaigrette (vegetarian, gluten-free) — $15

**Small Plates & Sharing**
- Smoked Bone Marrow (Chef's Pick) — roasted marrow bones, chimichurri, toasted sourdough, pickled shallots — $18
- Crispy Calamari — smoked paprika aioli, lemon, pickled jalapeños — $16
- Ember-Roasted Mushrooms — wild porcini & shiitake, garlic butter, parsley, shaved Parmesan (vegetarian) — $14
- Wagyu Beef Tartare — hand-cut wagyu, quail egg, Dijon, capers, shallots, charcoal crisps — $22
- Seared Scallops (Seasonal) — pan-seared day boat scallops, cauliflower purée, pancetta crisp, hazelnut butter — $24
- Grilled Flatbread Board — hummus, baba ghanoush, olive tapenade, roasted garlic (vegan) — $13

### Main Courses

**From the Grill** (all steaks served with one side & sauce of choice)
- Tomahawk Ribeye (Signature) — 1.2 kg, 36-day dry-aged, hickory-smoked, truffle butter, charred broccolini (gluten-free) — $68
- Wagyu Striploin — 300g MB6+ Australian Wagyu, house seasoning, horseradish cream (gluten-free) — $78
- Prime Filet Mignon — 220g centre-cut tenderloin, Béarnaise sauce, roasted garlic confit (gluten-free) — $56
- Cowboy Bone-In Ribeye — 700g, Josper-grilled, compound herb butter, red wine jus (gluten-free) — $72

Sauces (one complimentary, additional $3 each): Béarnaise · Peppercorn cream · Chimichurri · Red wine & shallot jus · Truffle butter

Sides ($8 each): Triple-cooked chips · Charred broccolini with chilli & almonds · Mac & cheese with smoked cheddar · Roasted bone marrow mash · Grilled asparagus with hollandaise · House side salad

**Seafood**
- Flame-Grilled Whole Lobster (Chef's Pick) — Atlantic lobster, garlic herb compound butter, lemon oil (gluten-free) — $52
- Grilled Sea Bass — whole sea bass, fennel & orange salsa, caperberry butter, crushed potatoes (gluten-free) — $42
- King Prawn Skewers — six tiger prawns, chermoula marinade, saffron couscous, harissa yoghurt — $36
- Smoked Salmon Fillet — cedar-plank smoked, dill cream cheese, cucumber ribbon, sourdough (gluten-free option) — $38

**Slow-Smoked & Braised**
- Slow-Smoked Pork Ribs — 12-hour cherry-wood smoked, house BBQ glaze, pickled slaw, cornbread — $38
- Smoked Brisket — 18-hour oak-smoked beef brisket, burnt ends, celeriac remoulade, brioche bun — $32
- Braised Lamb Shoulder — 8-hour slow-cooked, pomegranate & harissa glaze, pine nuts, tabbouleh (gluten-free) — $44

**Vegetarian & Plant-Based**
- Char-Grilled Cauliflower Steak — romesco, toasted almonds, raisins, herb oil (vegan, gluten-free) — $28
- Wild Mushroom Risotto — Arborio rice, porcini & truffle, Parmesan, fresh thyme, crispy shallots (vegetarian) — $26

### Desserts

- Dark Chocolate Fondant (Signature) — molten 70% cacao centre, smoked sea salt caramel, crème fraîche, hazelnut praline — $12
- Flambéed Crêpes Suzette (Tableside) — Grand Marnier, orange butter sauce, vanilla ice cream — $14
- Vanilla Bean Crème Brûlée — Madagascar vanilla, caramelised sugar crust, fresh berries (gluten-free) — $11
- Sticky Toffee Pudding — Medjool date sponge, butterscotch sauce, candied pecans, clotted cream — $11
- Lemon Tart — sharp lemon curd, French meringue, raspberry coulis, candied lemon zest — $10
- Artisan Cheese Selection — three seasonal cheeses, membrillo, walnuts, grapes, fig jam, crackers — $18
- Smoked Ice Cream Sundae — hickory-smoked vanilla ice cream, salted caramel, candied bacon, whipped cream — $13
- Vegan Dark Chocolate Mousse — aquafaba mousse, berry compote, toasted coconut (vegan, gluten-free) — $11

### Drinks

**Signature Cocktails**
- The Ember Old Fashioned — smoked bourbon, demerara, Angostura bitters, orange peel, torched cherry — $16
- Flames Sour — rye whiskey, lemon juice, honey syrup, egg white, smoked paprika rim — $15
- Char-Pineapple Mezcalita — mezcal, charred pineapple juice, chilli salt, lime, agave — $15
- Smoky Espresso Martini — vodka, cold brew, smoked Kahlúa, vanilla, coffee foam — $16
- Garden Spritz (Non-Alcoholic) — cucumber, elderflower, mint, lime, sparkling water — $9

**Wine by the Glass**
- Château Margaux Blanc (Bordeaux, France) — $18
- Penfolds Bin 389 Cabernet Shiraz (South Australia) — $22
- Cloudy Bay Sauvignon Blanc (Marlborough, NZ) — $14
- Billecart-Salmon Brut Rosé (Champagne, France) — $26

**Hot & Soft Drinks**
- Single Origin Espresso (Ethiopian Yirgacheffe) — $5
- Artisan Hot Chocolate (Valrhona 65%) — $6
- Loose-Leaf Tea (Earl Grey, Jasmine Green, Chamomile, Peppermint) — $5
- Craft Sodas (ginger beer, blood orange lemonade, sparkling elderflower) — $5

## Dietary Information

Gluten-free, dairy-free, vegetarian, and vegan options are available. Inform your server of any allergies or dietary needs on arrival, or note them in your reservation.
